'''Ben Gledhill''' (born 18 September 1989) is an English [[rugby league]] footballer who played for [[Wakefield Trinity]] and [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]] of [[Super League]]. He plays as a {{rlp|pr}}. Gledhill was an academy player at [[Castleford Tigers]] before joining Wakefield Trinity.<ref name="KEAR TURNS TO YOUNG DUO">{{cite web|url=http://www.sportinglife.com/rugbyleague/news/story_get.cgi?STORY_NAME=rleague/10/03/10/RUGBYL_Wakefield.html|title=KEAR TURNS TO YOUNG DUO|publisher=Sportinglife|date=10 March 2010|accessdate=2 April 2014|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110604224655/http://www.sportinglife.com/rugbyleague/news/story_get.cgi?STORY_NAME=rleague%2F10%2F03%2F10%2FRUGBYL_Wakefield.html|archivedate=4 June 2011|url-status=dead|df=dmy-all}}</ref>

In 2013, he switched to playing rugby union for [[Darlington RFC]], and then in April 2015 returned to play rugby league for [[Shaw Cross Sharks ARLFC]].
